nasb.text: I will give thanks to the Lord according to His righteousness And will sing praise to the name of the Lord Most High.

esv.text: I will give to the Lord the thanks due to his righteousness, and I will sing praise to the name of the Lord, the Most High.

cnv.text: 我要照著耶和華的公義稱謝他， 歌頌至高者耶和華的名。

ccb.text: 我要称谢耶和华的公义， 我要歌颂至高者耶和华的名。

csbs.text: 我要照着耶和华的公义称谢他， 歌颂耶和华至高者的名。
